channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Experts reveal 'LeakyLooker' flaws let hackers gain access to user information in Google Looker Studio, so be on your guard
item.description: Nine bugs were found in Google's Looker Studio which could have allowed outside access.

item.title: The Foldable iPhone Might Be More Android-Like Than iPad
item.description: That's either a good thing or bad thing.

item.title: Microsoft is introducing Entra passkeys to Windows – so tough luck if your device is jailbroken, as your credentials will soon be gone forever
item.description: Microsoft is bringing Entra ID to Windows devices - but be careful, Microsoft Authenticator is scanning rooted or cracked devices and wiping credentials

item.title: 4K Blu-rays have big discounts in Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale — here are my 6 picks, all of which I've personally tested
item.description: There's a ton of discounted 4K Blu-rays as part of Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale, but I've picked my 6 favorites.

item.title: Newly Discovered Comet Could Appear During the Day—If It’s Not Destroyed First
item.description: Comet MAPS (C/2026 A1) is set for a dangerous brush with our star.

item.title: Soldes de printemps Dreame : il ne vous reste plus que quelques jours pour en profiter [Sponso]
item.description: Besoin d'un aspirateur, d'un TV flambant neuf ou d'un sèche-cheveux dernier cri ? Avec les soldes de printemps Dreame, vous pourrez trouver cela, et bien plus encore, à prix (très) réduit.

item.title: DDR5 RAM hits painful new high in pricing — and it looks like the relentless price-hike misery will continue
item.description: If you were hoping the RAM crisis was abating, sadly that isn't the case as DDR5 has never been more expensive.

item.title: Vous avez une Switch 2 ? Cette carte microSD de 512 Go à -41 % est un must have pour vos jeux
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour les joueurs sur Nintendo Switch 2 : la carte microSDXC Lexar Play Pro de 512 Go passe à 99 euros au lieu de 169 euros chez Fnac. Une belle baisse de prix pour ce modèle compatible avec le format exigé par la nouvelle console.

item.title: Once-overpriced iPhone Air and Galaxy S25 cases are now 90 percent off
item.description: It’s pretty easy to get an affordable phone case that looks good, no matter the device you have. Yet, that doesn’t stop some companies from selling theirs for about the same cost as a dinner for two. Well, thanks to Woot, we now have a wider selection of affordable phone cases to choose from, with […]

item.title: Disney+ is rolling out its TikTok-like ‘Verts’ short-form video feed
item.description: Following the success of TikTok and Instagram Reels, Verts is designed to boost daily engagement and reach mobile-first viewers, all while increasing discovery across Disney+'s catalog.

item.title: Microsoft has recommitted to its Xbox Backwards Compatibility Program going forward and will be 'rolling out new ways to play some of the most iconic games from our past'
item.description: Microsoft has recommitted to its Xbox Backwards Compatibility Program for its future consoles and confirmed it will return in some form later this year.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs TV de 2026 ? Notre sélection
item.description: Vous cherchez le meilleur téléviseur pour vos besoins ? Bienvenue sur notre guide d'achat des meilleurs TV, incluant des modèles de technologie OLED, QLED, LCD et même QD-OLED.

item.title: Honda scraps 3 EVs planned for the US, blaming tariffs and Chinese competition
item.description: The Japanese automaker said the change of plans will cost it up to $15.7 billion.

item.title: No One Wants to Play Two-Face’s Awful Father in ‘The Batman, Part II’
item.description: Plus, Bryan Fuller is teaming up with Clive Barker for a new show.

item.title: Should You Be Taking Peptides?
item.description: From GLP-1s to anti-aging cocktails, peptides are being widely marketed as wellness boosters. Here's what experts say you should know before you buy in.

item.title: Anthropic doesn’t trust the Pentagon, and neither should you
item.description: Today we’re talking about the messy, fast-moving situation at Anthropic, the maker of Claude that now finds itself in a very ugly legal battle with the Pentagon. The back-and-forth is complicated, but as of a few days ago, the Pentagon had deemed Anthropic a supply chain risk, and Anthropic has filed a lawsuit challenging that […]

item.title: 1348 Ex Voto's stylish sword fighting and strong premise caught my attention, but the game's awful PC performance tainted the experience
item.description: A tale of a noble knight-errant seeking to save her love, 1348 Ex Voto doesn't quite manage to keep my attention and fails to offer a smooth experience on PC.

item.title: Apple encore largement épargné par la crise de la RAM, mais pour combien de temps ?
item.description: Alors que les projections les plus récentes prévoient des prix en forte hausse sur la mémoire RAM et les processeurs, les produits Apple sont pour l'instant à part.

item.title: I've hunted out the best 13-inch MacBook Air cases and bags to keep your new laptop protected
item.description: Cases, covers and bags to keep your swanky new MacBook safe from bumps and scratches.

item.title: Bespoke AI models are the next big thing in filmmaking
item.description: Though many AI boosters have convinced themselves that the technology can spit out films and television series whole cloth, claims of Hollywood being cooked feel very premature when you see what people are making with the most popular image/video models on the market. Models like Sora, Veo, and Runway just do not seem all that […]

item.title: The war in Iran is prompting these IEA member nations to tap into strategic oil reserves
item.description: Oil reserves have been released before, during wars in Iraq, Libya, and Ukraine. A widening war in Iran has halted oil tankers, made targets of refineries and spooked investors worried about the cascading impact of spiking energy prices.In response, the International Energy Agency agreed on Wednesday to release the largest volume of emergency oil reserves in its history, with the Paris-based organization pledging to make 400 million barrels of oil available from its member nations’ stockpiles. The announcement marked a shift in momentum in government response to the war upending the flow of oi...

item.title: Essential Gear for an Emergency Kit—for Cars or Go-Bags
item.description: We consulted preparedness experts and WIRED's team of testers for the essential gear to keep on hand in case of wildfires, earthquakes, and lord knows what else.

item.title: 'Printers are the security blind spot many SMBs overlook': SMBs are ignoring print security — and that could be a major problem for them
item.description: Printers aren't dumb peripherals, they're "connected, intelligent endpoints" that are putting your organization at risk of attacks, HP warns.

item.title: Téléviseurs Hisense et publicités forcées : un « test » qui a de quoi inquiéter
item.description: Les téléviseurs connectés de Hisense font actuellement l’objet de vives critiques après l’apparition de publicités obligatoires lors d’actions aussi basiques que l’allumage du téléviseur, le changement de source ou de chaîne. Il ne s’agirait que d’un test limité à certains marchés.

item.title: Xbox mode : Microsoft prive l’Europe de sa grosse nouveauté Windows 11 pour les joueurs
item.description: Microsoft a annoncé hier l'arrivée d'un tout nouveau Xbox mode, une expérience plein écran optimisée pour le jeu sur Windows 11. Si la première phase de test débute en avril, elle ne concerne malheureusement pas l'Europe pour le moment.

item.title: Vente de SFR : faillite, restructuration de la dette, offre de rachat… tout savoir sur la situation de l’opérateur
item.description: La vente de SFR commence à être un véritable feuilleton. Si le processus prend son temps, les offres de rachat s'accélérent notamment avec les trois autres opérateurs s'alliant pour proposer une offre. Nous faisons le point sur la situation de l'opérateur au carré rouge.

item.title: Tout ne serait pas une Xbox, finalement
item.description: Que restera-t-il du slogan « This is an Xbox » ? Probablement pas grand chose, si ce n'est une impasse marketing. Le message, martelé par Microsoft depuis 2024, n'est plus en odeur de sainteté : l'annonce initiale a été retirée du site de l'éditeur, ainsi que plusieurs supports promotionnels. Signe d'une gêne en interne, et d'un changement de stratégie....

item.title: Pédopornographie : le Parlement européen veut limiter la surveillance de nos conversations en ligne
item.description: Le Parlement européen accepte de prolonger jusqu'en août 2027 la possibilité qu'ont les plateformes en ligne de rechercher des contenus pédopornographiques dans nos messages, mais avec de nouvelles conditions. Ce texte, qui vise à renouveler le cadre actuel de détection volontaire à des fins de protection des mineurs, est maintenant négocié au sein du trilogue....

item.title: iPhone Fold : voici le rôle important que joue Samsung
item.description: Samsung devrait jouer un rôle majeur dans la conception de l'iPhone Fold d'Apple en tant que fournisseur d'écran et de RAM.

item.title: Disney+ gets its own time-sucking vertical video section
item.description: It’s not just the major social platforms that know how effective an endless scroll of short videos is at hijacking your dopamine system. Disney+ is adding Verts, a selection of short vertical clips you can scroll through to keep your brain chemistry happy when you are in the bathroom so inclined. The company says it’s a “dynamic feed” to help users “quickly find their next favorite watch,” letting you jump straight in to see the full movie or TV show the clip hails from. Not to mention the side benefit of elbowing out those social platforms, many of which use cut-down clips of Disney-owned con...

item.title: « Je suis complètement époustouflé » : le père de Windows 8 en admiration devant le MacBook Neo… qui lui rappelle la Microsoft Surface RT
item.description: Steven Sinofsky, ancien de Microsoft à qui l'on doit Windows 8 et la première tablette Surface RT, utilise un MacBook Neo au quotidien. L'appareil le rend nostalgique.

item.title: Starfleet Academy is the best first season of as Star Trek show ever
item.description: The first season of a TV show is a tricky thing. It has to convince people to watch it and justify the show’s existence to the network (or streaming service) execs. It has to deal with actors and writers who may not have fully dialed into the characters and world yet. There are some shows with absolutely stellar first seasons — Stranger Things, Veronica Mars and Ted Lasso are a few — but many other hit shows stumbled out of the gate, like The Office and Supernatural.Star Trek is not immune to this phenomenon. The Original Series had a decent first season, with classic episodes like “The City o...

item.title: Avec le FSR Diamond, AMD laisserait encore une grande partie des joueurs sur le carreau
item.description: AMD vient de livrer les premiers détails sur la prochaine version de sa technologie FSR qui sera en partie développée pour la prochaine Xbox. Mais ce « FSR 5 » qui ne dit pas son nom pourrait être exclusif à la prochaine génération de cartes graphiques Radeon en 2027.

item.title: Google’s GFiber internet business is merging with Astound Broadband
item.description: Google has announced that GFiber is merging with Astound Broadband, in an agreement that sees Astound’s parent company Stonepeak become the majority owner, with Alphabet retaining a minority stake. No financial specifics were detailed in a press release, but the new combined business will be an independent provider led by GFiber’s executive team, who Google says will use its "expertise in high-speed fiber innovation to manage the combined network footprint." Astound already serves over one million customers across the US, and by joining forces Google says the two providers will be able to gran...

item.title: Bumble stock is up today. Whitney Wolfe Herd’s solution to ‘swipe fatigue’ might be part of the reason why
item.description: On the surface, the company’s latest financial results weren’t great, but investors are responding positively anyway. Here’s what to know. Shares in Bumble Inc. (Nasdaq: BMBL), maker of the Bumble dating app, are surging this morning after the company announced its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results.

item.title: The top 10 most-followed Instagram accounts
item.description: The most-followed Instagram accounts right now

item.title: The next Xbox console, Project Helix, will 'advance the state of the art' and aims to be far superior to the Series X
item.description: Following the reveal of Project Helix earlier this month, Microsoft has now shared some of the console's specifications that will offer next-generation performance.

item.title: 'Looks far more expensive than it is' — FiiO's an automatic turntable has several bright ideas to light up your vinyl-loving life
item.description: This fully automatic turntable looks far more expensive than it is thanks to extensive use of aluminium. In addition to a good quality preamp and good Bluetooth codec support, it also features integrated lighting.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 12
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 12, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: ‘Your AI Slop Bores Me’ Gives You a Chance to See How the Sausage Is Made
item.description: These days, you don't even need to be good at chess to be a Mechanical Turk.

item.title: Google TV Streamer 4K : le prix du remplaçant du Chromecast est à prix cassé sur Amazon
item.description: Le Google TV Streamer 4K a pris la place du Chromecast il y a plus d'un an. Ce boîtier multimédia ambitieux, qui vous permet aussi de piloter votre maison connectée, est proposé à 94 euros au lieu de 119 euros pendant les ventes flash d'Amazon.

item.title: Pre-order the Pokémon: TCG Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box for under market price — save vs. Amazon
item.description: Preorder the Pokémon TCG: Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box for $89.63 at Walmart, beating Amazon and TCGplayer.

item.title: 'An unprecedented blow': US medtech giant Stryker suffers global outage after apparent Iranian cyberattack
item.description: Handala allegedly wipes thousands of mobile phones, computers, and servers belonging to Stryker.

item.title: The Apple Watch Series 11 is down to its best-ever price at Amazon — save $100
item.description: As of March 12, the Apple Watch Series 11 (GPS, 42mm) is on sale for $299 at Amazon, 25% off its list price of $399.

item.title: Comment Perplexity transforme votre Mac mini en véritable J.A.R.V.I.S
item.description: L'IA de Perplexity semble avoir trouvé un écrin idéal : le Mac mini. Le petit ordinateur de bureau d'Apple sert désormais de machine d'accueil toute trouvée pour l'assistant IA personnel de l'entreprise américaine, au travers de son nouveau projet « Personal Computer » dévoilé cette semaine.

item.title: Microsoft’s Copilot Health can connect to your medical records and wearables
item.description: Microsoft announced on Thursday that it's launching Copilot Health, a "separate, secure space" in Copilot for asking questions about lab results and medical records, searching for providers, analyzing data from wearables, and other health-related chats. The feature will have a phased rollout, so it won't be available to everyone immediately, but users can join a […]...

item.title: Netflix Has a Great Looking New Shark-Based Weather Disaster Movie
item.description: Jaws swims through the streets in 'Thrash,' starring Phoebe Dynevor, Whitney Peak, and Djimon Hounsou.

item.title: Google is using old news reports and AI to predict flash floods
item.description: A new way to solve data scarcity: Turning qualitative reports into quantitative data with an LLM.

item.title: As if Leica wasn’t exclusive enough already, a US price hike is imminent – adding hundreds of dollars to popular models
item.description: Leica has announced a host of moderate price increases across its M, SL and Q ranges of cameras and lenses.

item.title: GoFundMe launches AI fundraising coach to help people raise more money
item.description: The new tool drafts campaign messages, suggests titles and photos, and guides users on how to share their fundraiser. Since its founding in 2010, GoFundMe has become the go-to platform for helping others in need, with more than $50 million raised every week and more than 8,000 fundraising campaigns launched every day.

item.title: Whoop calls its new clothing range a 'technical garment system' and I honestly don't know what else I expected
item.description: Whoop courts the hypebeasts with a predictable take on high-fashion athleisure.
